mapper.select: SELECT SR.shipment_request_num, SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, RS.status_name AS request_status, SR.request_qty, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, E.ename, I.name, I.type FROM shipment_request SR JOIN request_status RS ON SR.status_num = RS.status_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num ORDER BY SR.shipment_request_num DESC

SELECT SR.shipment_request_num, SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, RS.status_name AS request_status, SR.request_qty, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, E.ename, I.name, I.type FROM shipment_request SR JOIN request_status RS ON SR.status_num = RS.status_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE 1 = 1
AND RS.status_name = #{status}
AND upper(I.type) = upper(#{type})
AND ( upper(V.vender_name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(SR.request_id) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
AND SR.due_date >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SR.due_date < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND SR.due_date < SYSDATE + 1
AND RS.status_name NOT IN ('출하완료', '취소')
ORDER BY
SR.due_date ASC SR.shipment_request_num DESC

SELECT SR.shipment_request_num, SR.request_id, TO_CHAR(SR.request_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS request_date, TO_CHAR(SR.due_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS due_date, RS.status_name AS request_status, SR.request_qty, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, V.vender_num, E.ename, E.emp_num, I.name, I.item_num, I.type, I.unit FROM shipment_request SR JOIN request_status RS ON SR.status_num = RS.status_num JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num JOIN item I ON SR.item_num = I.item_num WHERE SR.request_id = #{_parameter}
SELECT V.emp_num FROM shipment_request SR JOIN vender V ON SR.vender_num = V.vender_num WHERE SR.request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT V.vender_num, V.vender_name, V.vender_type, V.vender_phone, V.ven_ename, E.ename FROM vender V JOIN emp E ON V.emp_num = E.emp_num WHERE upper(V.vender_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{_parameter}) || '%' ORDER BY V.vender_name
SELECT item_num, name FROM item WHERE UPPER(type) = 'PRODUCT' ORDER BY name
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'SREQ' || LPAD(REQUEST_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO shipment_request (shipment_request_num, request_id, request_date, vender_num, due_date, status_num, item_num, request_qty) VALUES (#{shipment_request_num}, REPLACE(#{shipment_request_num}, 'SREQ', 'REQ'), TO_DATE(#{request_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{vender_num}, TO_DATE(#{due_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), (SELECT status_num FROM request_status WHERE status_name = '접수'), #{item_num}, #{request_qty})
